assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddSigningCredential with the new key (from LoadNewKey()) and SecurityAlgorithms.RsaSha256
Program.cs calls AddValidationKey with the old key (from LoadOldKey()) and SecurityAlgorithms.RsaSha256
AddSigningCredential is called with the NEW key (not the old key), and AddValidationKey is called with the OLD key (not the new key)
assertions.rationale: Correctly assigns new key to signing and old key to validation.
